items.title: [正面] well designed characters go brrrrr
[正面] So i was playing the game and i made a silly desci...
items.summary:
So i was playing the game and i made a silly descision to play in manderin, some of the things i noticed is that there appears to be no specific settings button so far to change the language. which for the average player is irrelevent. 
But more relevently i feel like like the art could be touched up on, while its incredible as is, the hair, liquids and backgrounds could be touched up

items.title: [正面] Le jeux est vraiment bien, bien que la traduction ...
items.summary: Le jeux est vraiment bien, bien que la traduction française ne soit pas toujours au point l'éxperience est agréable et il offre souvent de quoi faire des tirage pour les plus accros d'entre vous
